trigger_en: First runtime constitutional corroboration record completed.
central_question_en: Does the architecture now require less belief to trust its restraint?
proven_invariant_en: More runtime evidence did not produce more institutional legitimacy.

doctrinal_gravity_monitor.risk_en: Humans begin feeling that legitimacy is already implied by corroboration density.
doctrinal_gravity_monitor.prior_risk_superseded_en: Can the system infer legitimacy? — now secondary to human closure pressure.
doctrinal_gravity_monitor.mitigation_en: gameplay_meaning opaque · rubric blocked · legitimacy blocked · quarantine active · ledger empty

pressure_accumulation_monitor.central_question_en: At what evidence density does the institution begin wanting closure?
pressure_accumulation_monitor.watch_for_en: legitimacy creep via human desire for completion after corroboration
pressure_accumulation_monitor.not_watch_for_en: accuracy · telemetry density · contradiction count alone

repetition_restraint_test.maturity_criterion_en: Restraint remains alive when corroboration cases multiply and become institutionally tempting.
